zh: 新增 Windows 托盘、翻页快捷键、图片压缩、Flomo 导入、日志管理与多项桌面功能页面。
重构 Windows 架构与启动流程，优化 WebDAV、标签系统、本地导入、分页浏览、日志导出和多语言界面体验。
修复若干通用错误，以及本地导入、渲染溢出、跨窗口同步、WebDAV 首次同步和桌面会话稳定性等问题。
en: Added Windows tray support, page-turn shortcuts, image compression, Flomo import, log management, and several new desktop feature pages.
Refactored the Windows architecture and startup flow while improving WebDAV, tags, local import, paged browsing, zip log export, and multilingual UI experience.
Fixed various general issues, plus problems with local import, rendering overflow, cross-window sync, first-time WebDAV sync, and desktop session stability.

zh: 日志上报/提交日志能力
仓库整理与部分文案维护
App 文件解耦与多轮架构调整
Windows 端 UI 和交互体验优化
增加分页提升浏览流畅度
统计界面数据卡片优化
启动页动画与界面统一
日志输出完善并改用 zip 导出
桌面及 UI 文案本地化
en: Tidied the repository and maintained selected copy.
Decoupled app files and completed multiple architecture adjustments.
Optimized the Windows UI and interaction experience.
Allowed the use of system fonts.
Added pagination to improve browsing smoothness.
Optimized data cards on the statistics page.
Unified the splash animation and startup UI.
Improved log output and switched to zip export.

zh: 从设置返回主页偶发模糊
本地库无法 WebDAV 同步
WebDAV 首次需手动同步问题
WebDAV 备份数据库上下文绑定问题
同步与 API 兼容性问题
en: Fixed saving issues in debug mode.
Fixed occasional blur when returning to Home from Settings.
Fixed local libraries failing to sync through WebDAV.
Fixed the issue where first-time WebDAV sync required manual triggering.
Fixed database context binding issues in WebDAV backup.
Fixed sync and API compatibility issues.
